narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township I (precinct in Lucas County) has 852 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
